name: Circular Text
description: Text rotates along a circular SVG path. Hover spring-animates the rotation direction to reverse, then eases back when mouse leaves.
accessibility_notes: SVG text is accessible to screen readers

text.description: The text to display along the circular path

speed.description: Rotation speed in degrees per second

className.description: CSS class for the wrapper div

conflicts: long text may overlap itself if radius is too small
